name: Factorial
description: Factorial HR platform for employee management, time-off, and payroll

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Factorial as an admin
2. Go to Settings > API Keys
3. Create a new API key
4. Copy the key and paste it below

Note: API Keys have full admin access. Store securely.

checks.name: App Availability
checks.description: Verifies Factorial HR platform is accessible

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Verifies Factorial HR user identity and access
